# growthbook_environment (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook environment by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "growthbook_environment" "production" {
  id = "production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The environment identifier/name.

### Read-Only

- `default_state` (Boolean) Default enabled state for new features.
- `description` (String) Description of the environment.
- `parent` (String) Parent environment, if any.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this environment is scoped to.
- `toggle_on_list` (Boolean) Whether shown on the feature list page.
